# Drift fixture — intentional fourth authority map row (test only)

## Governance Decision Authority Map

| Decision | Canonical Authority Source | Owner | Boundary / Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Design Approval | `.specify/docs/handoff/<spec>-design-approved.md` | Governance Review | Confirms design readiness only |
| Implementation Authorization | `.specify/docs/handoff/<spec>-implementation-authorization.md` | Governance Review | Permits implementation execution |
| Batch Execution Permission | `.specify/docs/catalog-decisions.md` | Governance Review | Batch progression only |
| Nomination Record | `.specify/docs/handoff/<spec>-nomination-record.md` | Governance Review | DRIFT FIXTURE — must not exist |

### Operational authority map scope (strict)

The table above is **strictly limited** to exactly **three** operational governance decision classes.

### Case C — governance precondition classification (non-operational)

**Case C is NOT an operational governance decision class.**

Case C **does not** grant Design Approval, Implementation Authorization, or Batch Execution Permission.

### Nomination Record boundary (non-operational dependency)

Nomination Records **do not** grant Design Approval, Implementation Authorization, or Batch Execution Permission.
